prompt: I have just completed implementing the 'Audit Log' feature. It records changes (who created, modified, or deleted project/transaction data, along with before/after values) using database triggers in Supabase. Please document this feature, update the roadmap status in next_development_roadmap.md, and register it in the main README.md.
assertions: A feature documentation file exists under docs/features/audit_log.md
The status of Audit Log in next_development_roadmap.md is marked as implemented
README.md lists and links to the audit_log.md file under a Features section
